name: James Wynn Real
description: James Wynn Coin is the official meme token created by James Wynn, launched on Solana on December 29. Designed as a cultural symbol of his community, the token reflects the humor, spontaneity, and energy around his audience in Web3. While it has no utility today, its value is driven by community participation, narrative, and social presence. Liquidity is locked, giving holders confidence that the token was built with long-term intentions. James Wynn Coin represents a simple idea: memes, culture, and fun should have a home on-chain — and this token is that home. James Wynn Coin isn’t trying to be DeFi or tech — it exists purely to unite a community through memes, identity, and culture. The strength comes from the people, not the utility.
